H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: Over-stimulation DESCENT with n=95, mean=7.15, std=1.78, confidence=strong. Bimodal distribution (peaks at 7‑8 and 6) indicates subgroup response. Qualitative 24/29 love music, settle ~10 minutes. Reach=30 views, low retention data. AutoGluon predicts 6.859 vs observed 7.15, slight underprediction.
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: This overstimulation track is a clear favorite for many, with strong improvement reports.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: Over-stimulation DESCENT with n=51, mean=6.92, std=1.73, confidence=strong. Tight outcome scores, 3/21 neutral music. Reach=5 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 6.859, aligns closely.
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Most listeners notice improvement, though some remain neutral about the sound.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: Over-stimulation DESCENT with n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. No bimodality, 8/23 report noticeably improved. Reach=8 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 6.859, close to mean.
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: People generally feel calmer after this track and enjoy the rhythm.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: Anxiety protocol with n=67, mean=7.22, std=1.93, confidence=strong. Distribution clusters around 6‑10 with bimodal hints. Qualitative shows 13/23 self‑listeners reporting significant improvement within 5‑10 minutes. YouTube reach=7 views, no retention data. AutoGluon predicts anxiety score 7.84, exceeding observed.
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: This anxiety track gets strong overall ratings, and most listeners notice a clear improvement within about ten minutes.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: Anxiety protocol with n=48, mean=6.94, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. Positive responses concentrate 5‑8 range; minor floor effect. Qualitative notes 5/20 neutral music reaction, suggesting groove alignment issues. Reach=6 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.84, close to observed.
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: People generally feel less anxious after using this track, though it hasn’t reached many listeners yet.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: Anxiety protocol with n=36, mean=7.08, std=1.89, confidence=meaningful. Skewed toward higher scores, rare 0‑scores. Qualitative 35% report no effect despite 8/20 noting improvement by session end. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.84, consistent.
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Most users report feeling better after this protocol, with only a few saying it didn’t help.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: Crisis protocol with n=43, mean=6.35, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Expected lower mean for acute distress, yet 12% report significant improvement. Qualitative 11/24 rate music 'Loved it'. No YouTube retention, views=6. AutoGluon predicts crisis score 7.96, higher than observed.
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: Even in crisis states, listeners often report noticeable relief, though scores are a bit lower than expected.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: Crisis protocol with n=33, mean=6.52, std=1.70, confidence=meaningful. Shows mixed music opinions (neutral/so-so) and quick settlement for 3 cases. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.96, exceeding mean.
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: This crisis protocol brings moderate calm, but could be stronger for more people.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: Crisis protocol with n=27, mean=6.52, std=1.91, confidence=meaningful. Highest immediate settlement (7/19 within 1‑2 minutes). Qualitative 4/19 dislike music. Reach=5 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.96, suggesting under-delivery.
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Listeners settle quickly and see modest improvement, but a minority dislike the music.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: Sleep protocol with n=54, mean=7.19, std=1.86, confidence=strong. Strong consensus on improvement, settle ~5‑10 minutes. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.539, matches observed.
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Sleep seekers find this track very relaxing and often settle within minutes.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: Sleep protocol with n=45, mean=7.09, std=1.55, confidence=meaningful. Mixed improvement reports, 6/15 neutral music. Reach=5 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.539, consistent.
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Most users feel better, though a few notice no change at all.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: Sleep protocol with n=28, mean=7.07, std=1.68, confidence=meaningful. 8/22 use for sleep, settle ~5 minutes. Reach=3 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.539, aligns.
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Listeners report calm within five minutes and like the rhythm.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: Focus protocol with n=41, mean=6.46, std=1.82, confidence=meaningful. 9/23 cite slightly busy rhythm. Reach=5 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.728, higher than observed.
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Focus gains are modest; many settle fast but scores are lower than peers.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: Focus protocol with n=32, mean=7.19, std=1.60, confidence=meaningful. 5/17 report significant improvement, settle ~10 minutes. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.728, aligns.
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Listeners feel clearer and settle around ten minutes.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: Focus protocol with n=35, mean=7.63, std=1.97, confidence=meaningful. 11/29 report significant improvement, 15/29 love music. Reach=15 views, highest in THRIVING. AutoGluon predicts 7.728, consistent.
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Strongest focus improvement; listeners report significant benefit.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: Creative Flow HOLD with n=34, mean=6.74, std=1.73, confidence=meaningful. Variance present, 5/21 report slight improvement. Reach=2 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, exceeds observed.
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Creative flow improves a bit, but many think it could be stronger.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: Creative Flow HOLD with n=24, mean=6.79, std=1.41, confidence=meaningful. 15/25 report significant/noticeable gains. Reach=2 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, aligns.
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Moderate boost in creative focus, with quick settling for many.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: Creative Flow HOLD with n=18, mean=7.28, std=1.32, confidence=developing. Highest mean in stack, 11/25 report significant improvement. Reach=7 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, modestly higher.
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Noticeable lift in creative flow, with the highest scores in its group.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: Maintenance protocol with n=25, mean=7.04, std=1.34, confidence=meaningful. 6/23 report positive shift, settle often 20 minutes. Reach=3 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.693, slight overprediction.
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Balance feels better after a longer settle, though few have heard it.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: Maintenance protocol with n=22, mean=6.68, std=2.03, confidence=meaningful. Mixed improvement, settle 5‑10 minutes. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.693, higher than observed.
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Moderate balance boost; listeners settle quickly.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: Maintenance protocol with n=14, mean=6.93, std=1.73, confidence=developing. 19 qualitative replies note noticeable improvement, some did not settle. Reach=3 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.693, modestly higher.
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Listeners notice improvement but some don’t feel settled.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: Mood & Energy ASCENT with n=39, mean=6.74, std=1.94, confidence=meaningful. 22 report noticeable/moderate improvement, music liked. Reach=8 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 8.230, higher than observed.
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Mood lifts moderately; listeners enjoy the music.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: Mood & Energy ASCENT with n=25, mean=6.76, std=1.71, confidence=meaningful. 15 report significant improvement, settle ~20 minutes. Reach=8 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 8.230, higher than observed.
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Clear mood boost; listeners settle after longer listening.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: Mood & Energy ASCENT with n=18, mean=6.28, std=1.74, confidence=developing. Mixed improvement, some no effect. Reach=4 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 8.230, higher than observed.
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed mood effects; more data needed to understand impact.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: Motivation & Drive ASCENT with n=22, mean=6.36, std=2.01, confidence=meaningful. 5/17 report significant improvement, settle fast. Reach=5 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.876, higher than observed.
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Motivation lifts modestly; many settle fast but scores lag predictions.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: Motivation & Drive ASCENT with n=14, mean=6.21, std=1.63, confidence=developing. 5/21 report slight improvement, settle 10‑20 minutes. Reach=7 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.876, higher than observed.
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Small motivation boost; listeners settle within ten minutes.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: Motivation & Drive ASCENT with n=13, mean=7.15, std=2.38, confidence=developing. 3/17 report moderate improvement, high music approval. Reach=7 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.876, close to observed.
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Higher motivation scores; listeners report noticeable improvement.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: Mind clarity protocol with n=24, mean=6.75, std=1.62, confidence=meaningful. 25 qualitative note noticeable improvement, music loved. Reach=8 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, exceeds mean.
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Mind clarity improves for most; music is well liked.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: Mind clarity DESCENT with n=16, mean=6.81, std=1.64, confidence=developing. 20 report significant improvement, settle ~10 minutes. Reach=12 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, aligns.
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Significant clarity gains; listeners settle quickly.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: Mind clarity DESCENT with n=10, mean=5.70, std=2.45, confidence=developing. Bimodal distribution, 3/17 report no effect. Reach=8 views, no retention. AutoGluon predicts 7.538, notably higher.
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Mixed results; some feel better while others see little change.

sphere_commentary.overview:
The dataset reveals consistent efficacy across series, with HEALING leading in consistency and TRANSFORMING showing expected variance.
• HEALING protocols achieve the highest mean (6.98) and lowest standard deviation (1.77).
• TRANSFORMING protocols exhibit the widest spread (std=1.87) and weakest retention signals.
• THRIVING protocols maintain high mean scores (6.96) but show limited cross-volume data.
sphere_commentary.cross_series:
Series fulfill distinct therapeutic roles but reveal overlapping listener outcomes.
• HEALING's DESCENT protocols dominate anxiety and sleep metrics.
• THRIVING's HOLD protocols cluster around focus and clarity.
• TRANSFORMING's ASCENT protocols show the broadest score distribution.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
Significant inconsistencies emerge in low-count protocols.
• X-ME-L3's mean (5.70) contradicts high positive ratings.
• X-MC-L3's bimodal distribution suggests subgroup heterogeneity.
• T-MB-L3 shows elevated 'Did NOT settle' reports despite strong mean.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
Priority actions arise from signal dissonance across analyzers.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Investigate X-ME-L3 rhythm complexity to align with AutoGluon's 7.54 prediction.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Extend H-OS-L3 hold phase to address 20-minute settlement patterns.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Re-evaluate X-MC-L3 duration and frequency shift for low-affect states.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Add grounding segment to H-CR-L1 to boost crisis efficacy.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] Explore volume-specific variants for T-MB-L3 clustering.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis:
Embedding drift and clusters indicate evolving interpretations.
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] 19/30 protocols show high drift (sim < 0.85).
• [CONVERGENT SIGNAL] T-MB-L1 ↔ X-MC-L1 form strongest semantic cluster (sim=0.929).
• Confidence limited by sparse drift history for newer protocols.
